title: Fix BuildGoalRequest origin typo + require all three axes for explicit origin + add tests
description:
## Council-merged task (absorbs TSK-0095 + TSK-0097)

## Evidence
`Agent.Planning/IntentManager.cs` line 187: `if (OriginX is null || OriginZ is null || OriginZ is null)` — OriginZ checked twice, OriginY never checked. Same bug in `BuildGoalRequest.Parameters` property.

Additionally, `BuildGoal.HasExplicitOrigin` (BuildGoal.cs:56) returns true if ANY axis is present, causing missing axes to silently become 0 via `?? 0` in BuildGoalDecomposer.

## Impact
Malformed build requests with missing Y coordinate leak through as valid. Partial origin collapses to (x, 0, z) silently.

## Fix
1. Change second `OriginZ` to `OriginY` in the null check on line 187
2. Change `HasExplicitOrigin` to require all three axes: `OriginX.HasValue && OriginY.HasValue && OriginZ.HasValue`
3. Verify `GoalFactory.CreateAsync` handles null Parameters correctly
4. Add NUnit tests:
   - All three origins present → Parameters is non-null with correct values
   - OriginX null → Parameters is null
   - OriginY null → Parameters is null (regression guard for the typo)
   - OriginZ null → Parameters is null
   - All three null → Parameters is null

## Verification
Verified against codebase 2026-06-23. Council: `Data/Pages/council/audit-task-prioritization-council-2026-06-24.md`
